news.t: High Yield Munis Useful for Diversification, Extra Income
VanEck Lowers Fees For Three ETFs
VanEck to Transition Underlying Indexes for Several of Its Municipal Bond ETFs

overview.description: The VanEck High Yield Muni ETF (HYD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of high-yield, tax-exempt US municipal bonds. HYD was launched on Feb 4, 2009 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: ICE Broad High Yield Crossover Municipal

data.title: High Yield Munis Useful for Diversification, Extra Income
data.text: When advisors and investors hear the terms “high yield” or “junk” as it relates to bonds, they understandably have some apprehension. After all, junk bonds carry elevated credit risk relative to their...

data.title: VanEck Lowers Fees For Three ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announces that, effective today June 20th, three of its Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) will have lower management fees.

data.title: VanEck to Transition Underlying Indexes for Several of Its Municipal Bond ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announces plans to change underlying indexes tracked by some of the firm's municipal bond ETFs to new indexes from ICE Data Indices (“ICE”)

data.title: High-yield ETF issuer on his forecast for 'fallen angels,' gold
data.text: Van Eck Associates CEO Jan van Eck and Seymour Asset Management CIO Tim Seymour unpack what could lie ahead for high-yield ETFs and gold with CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: Why are ETFs are trading at big discounts
data.text: CNBC's Dom Chu breaks down ETFs amid the coronavirus pandemic.

data.title: Bond funds are seeing record money flows as stocks collapse. Here's what to watch
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani discusses the record levels of flows in bond-based exchange-traded funds with Tom Lydon of ETF Trends and Andrew McOrmond of WallachBeth Capital.
